cross_scene_arcs.title: Rise to Operational Command
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gabriel transitions from a concealed planner to the visible leader of a high-stakes operation, asserting control over SWAT, entering the target site, and commanding armed subordinates inside the bank.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emergent operational leader with hidden device
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: in full command of the occupied bank and hostage situation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: true purpose of the collars and devices on hostages

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation of Threat and Autonomy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gabriel escalates the crisis by revealing explosives on hostages, defies a senator's order to stand down, and ultimately executes the senator, asserting complete independence from government authority.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: autonomous actor who has killed a senior official and rejected institutional control
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: consequences of killing a high-ranking official remain pending

cross_scene_arcs.title: Manipulation and Ideological Framing
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gabriel recruits Stanley with financial and emotional leverage, then attempts to justify his actions as patriotic, though Stanley remains unmoved by the ideological appeal.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: ideological justifier asserting moral authority, but failing to convert Stanley
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Stanley does not accept Gabriel's justification and rejects his ideological framing

cross_scene_arcs.title: Execution and Escape
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gabriel completes the heist, escapes via helicopter, stages a disappearance using an elephant suit, and resurfaces in Monte Carlo with the funds and Ginger, successfully evading capture.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fugitive on a boat with illicit funds and accomplice, operating under a new identity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: long-term sustainability of evasion and false identity

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Intrusion to Coercion: Ginger's Campaign to Re-Engage Stan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ginger initiates contact with Stan by demonstrating skill and gaining his attention, escalates by delivering emotional and professional provocations, is violently rejected, then shifts to offering financial leverage to compel cooperation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ginger enters Stan's isolated world as an uninvited catalyst.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ginger positions herself as a broker with resources Stan needs, using money to pressure him into compliance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Stan's distrust remains, and Ginger's tactics risk alienating the very person she needs to influence.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shifting Allegiances: Ginger's Evolving Relationship with Stan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ginger begins a physical and emotional relationship with Stan under Gabriel's roof, is exposed as wired and under duress, reveals her DEA identity, disarms, and shifts toward open emotional support for Stan.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ginger initiates intimacy with Stan while ostensibly working for Gabriel.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ginger discloses her true identity as a DEA agent and becomes emotionally aligned with Stan, expressing admiration and gratitude.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her emotional involvement compromises her professional role, and Stan's silence after her thank you creates emotional distance.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ginger's Survival and Disappearance: From Captive to Escapee
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ginger is used as a human lever by Gabriel, appears to be killed, is reported missing, and is later seen escaping with Gabriel to Monte Carlo, suggesting her survival and active participation in the aftermath.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ginger is captured and used as a hostage to pressure Stan.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ginger is seen alive, leaving Monte Carlo with Gabriel and illicit funds, presumed to be on the run.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Ginger's survival was premeditated, and if her alliance with Gabriel is coerced or voluntary, remains unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Hidden Operative: Ginger's Dual Role and Coercion
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ginger is revealed to be under Gabriel's control, fearing for her life if she speaks, discloses her DEA identity under duress, and is ultimately used as a pawn in the final confrontation, leading to her apparent death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ginger admits she cannot reveal her identity because Gabriel will kill her.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ginger is captured and killed by Gabriel to exert pressure on Stan.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The extent of her agency throughout the operation—whether she was a victim, a double agent, or a collaborator—remains ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Conviction to Coerced Complicity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stanley begins as a morally rigid figure who rejects narratives where criminals win, but is gradually drawn into Gabriel's criminal world through manipulation and coercion, ultimately collaborating on a high-stakes cyberattack despite his earlier principles.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stanley insists that the 'bad guy' must be defeated, reflecting a black-and-white moral framework.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Stanley agrees to create a worm to break military-grade encryption for Gabriel, compromising his earlier moral stance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The extent to which Stanley is complicit versus coerced remains ambiguous, especially as his actions serve both survival and paternal motives.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Isolation to Reconnection with Holly
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stanley evolves from a reclusive, emotionally detached hacker to an active, determined father fighting to reconnect with and protect his daughter, culminating in their escape together.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stanley lives in isolation, avoiding emotional and familial entanglements.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Stanley and Holly are on the road together, rebuilding their relationship in freedom.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Their future remains uncertain, with potential legal and external threats looming.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Loss of Agency and Reclamation of Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stanley transitions from passive observer to coerced operative, then asserts agency by acting independently to stop Gabriel, only to be arrested despite his success.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Stanley follows Gabriel out of curiosity or obligation, with unclear motivation and limited control.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Stanley takes decisive action to eliminate a threat but is immediately subdued and treated as a criminal.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Stanley's actions are effective but unrecognized, leaving his legal and social status unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ginger's Role in Stanley's Transformation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ginger disrupts Stanley's isolation, reveals critical personal information, offers financial leverage, and becomes a conduit into the criminal plot, maintaining ambiguous loyalty throughout.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ginger appears uninvited and challenges Stanley's competence and detachment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ginger is entangled in both Gabriel's operation and Stanley's personal life, with unclear ultimate allegiance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ginger's true motives and whether she is manipulating or genuinely aiding Stanley remain unclear.
